nasb.text: Then Ahab said to Obadiah, “Go through the land to all the springs of water and to all the valleys; perhaps we will find grass and keep the horses and mules alive, and not have to kill some of the cattle.”

esv.text: And Ahab said to Obadiah, “Go through the land to all the springs of water and to all the valleys. Perhaps we may find grass and save the horses and mules alive, and not lose some of the animals.”

cnv.text: 亞哈對俄巴底說：“你走遍這地，到所有的水泉和溪水那裡去看看，也許我們可以找到青草，使騾馬能夠生存，免得牲畜滅絕。”

ccb.text: 对他说：“我们去各地的水泉和河谷，也许可以找到草救活骡马，不致丧失牲畜。”
